steps.title: Fastest path: graph or solve the equation
steps.content:
Type the equation into Desmos as written:
$$(x - 18)(x - 10)(x + 3)(x + 19) = 0$$Graph it and use the visible intercept, root, or vertex the question asks for. The requested value is $18$ or $10$.

steps.title: Identify the positive solution
steps.content: The positive solutions are $18$ and $10$. The answer is 18 or 10.
